hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git commit|git push" || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; ls playwright.config.* >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; npx playwright test --reporter=line >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; echo "Playwright tests failing. Fix before commit." >&2; exit 2'
